title: Python (programming language)
text: Python is a high-level general-purpose programming language. Its design philosophy emphasizes code readability with the use of significant indentation.

title: Machine learning
text: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that provides systems the ability to automatically learn and improve from experience.

title: Paris
text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France with an estimated population of over 2 million residents.

title: Photosynthesis
text: Photosynthesis is a process used by plants and other organisms to convert light energy into chemical energy that can be stored.

title: Albert Einstein
text: Albert Einstein was a German-born theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity, one of the two pillars of modern physics.

title: DNA
text: Deoxyribonucleic acid is a molecule composed of two polynucleotide chains that coil around each other to form a double helix.

title: World War II
text: World War II was a global conflict that lasted from 1939 to 1945 and involved the vast majority of the world's countries.

title: Climate change
text: Climate change includes both global warming driven by human-induced emissions of greenhouse gases and the resulting large-scale shifts in weather patterns.

title: Shakespeare
text: William Shakespeare was an English playwright, poet, and actor widely regarded as the greatest writer in the English language.

title: Quantum mechanics
text: Quantum mechanics is a fundamental theory in physics that provides a description of the physical properties of nature at the scale of atoms.
